name: Ainsworth Three Amigos A-Star Slot Machine
description: This Ainsworth Three Amigos slot machine is housed in the tall A-Star portrait cabinet with a vibrant chasing-light topper that really draws the eye. The game is part of the Bonus Bonanza four-tier progressive series, featuring Grand, Major, Minor, and Mini jackpots along with a fun Latin-themed bonus round. Refurbished and ready for home game room use, it ships tested with a standard dealer warranty.
highlights: Tall portrait HD video display with vivid Three Amigos theme
Bonus Bonanza 4-tier progressive jackpots (Grand, Major, Minor, Mini)
TITO ticket-in/ticket-out ready, converts to free play for home use
Refurbished and backed by a dealer warranty
